message:
fix(tests): add afterEach cleanup to prevent /tmp inode exhaustion

Tests were creating temp directories with random UUIDs but never
cleaning them up. After thousands of test runs, this exhausted the
system's 1M inode limit on /tmp, causing "no space left on device"
errors even with plenty of disk space.

Added afterEach hooks to all storage test files and afterAll cleanup
to brenner.test.ts with helper functions for tracking temp paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
